expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

contacts.name: Richard (Suricata Safaris)
contacts.notes: Safari balance (USD 960) due on arrival. Ask about ranger tip before payment.

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Actual driver/guide for the crater day. Not the office contact.

contacts.name: Eileen Hotel Cairo
contacts.notes: Aug 3-5 and potentially Aug 19-20 stopover stay.

contacts.name: The Rock Restaurant Zanzibar
contacts.notes: Aug 15, 18:00-20:00, 2 adults. Fully paid USD 46. Outdoor seating.

contacts.name: Tanzania e-visa portal
contacts.notes: Mandatory. USD 50/person. Visa-on-arrival no longer available as of Jan 2025.

costs.notes: USD 240 deposit paid. USD 960 balance due on arrival in cash (post-2009 USD notes) or Pesapal online +5%.
Per vehicle, per trip. Suricata pays this as part of the package.
Peak season rate. Paid by Suricata as part of package.
Peak season rate. Paid by Suricata as part of package.
Mandatory at visa.immigration.go.tz. Visa-on-arrival no longer available as of Jan 2025.
Must have printed copy. Multiple-entry required for two Cairo stopovers.
2 adults, 18:00-20:00, 2x Tropical Passion Fruit Cheesecake. Outdoor seating requested.
About USD 15, valid up to 3 months. In addition to IDP.

costs.line_item: Two beaded bracelets (Maasai lady, Ngorongoro rim)
costs.notes: For Athina Mari. Approximately USD 20-25. Paid in shillings.
Emmanuel mentioned ~TZS 5,000 cash. Need to ask Richard before safari balance payment.

itinerary.notes: Grand Egyptian Museum, Pyramids of Giza

itinerary.lodging: Suricata Safaris package (Twiga Camps + Jevas Hotel)
itinerary.notes: 3-day group camping safari with Suricata Safaris Ltd. Richard +255 763 222 293.
The Rock Restaurant Aug 15, Nungwi swimming
Arrive by ferry. Kivukoni Fish Market, Kariakoo, National Museum, Coco Beach, Bongoyo Island
Islamic Cairo, Citadel, Khan el-Khalili, Coptic Cairo

ngorongoro_tariffs.notes: Valid for ONE entry within 24 hours only. Under 5 free.
Only 4x4 vehicles up to 3,500kg tare allowed on crater floor. 3,001-7,000kg is USD 236.
Non-EA adult rate. Tanzanian adult: TZS 17,700.
Charged in addition to entry permit.
Crater descent. Gates close 16:00; driving hours 06:00-18:00.
Walking safaris require NCAA armed ranger. Long (4+hrs): USD 29.50.

trip_memories.title: Stone Town Courtyard
trip_memories.description: Interior courtyard of a building in Stone Town, Zanzibar.
trip_memories.detail: White stucco walls, arched windows, ornate dark wooden balconies stacked above each other with carved railings. Warm sunlight, clear blue sky overhead. Mediterranean/Middle Eastern feel with an unusual inward-looking layout around the courtyard. Multi-story building or hotel.

trip_memories.title: Ngorongoro Crater Day — Voice Memo
trip_memories.description: Voice memo recorded during the Ngorongoro crater descent day.
trip_memories.detail: Driver/guide is Emmanuel. Bought two beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady at the rim for Athina Mari (~TZS 35,000). Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip of ~TZS 5,000 cash expected at the gate.

voice_memo_facts.detail: The driver and guide for the Ngorongoro crater day is Emmanuel (not Richard, who is the office contact at Suricata Safaris).

voice_memo_facts.fact: Two beaded bracelets for Athina Mari
voice_memo_facts.detail: Purchased two beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady at the Ngorongoro crater rim. Approximately USD 20-25 (TZS ~35,000).

voice_memo_facts.fact: Extra ranger tip at Ngorongoro gate
voice_memo_facts.detail: Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip expected at the gate: around TZS 5,000 cash, separate from park fees.

voice_memo_facts.fact: Ask Richard about ranger tip before safari balance payment
voice_memo_facts.detail: Before paying the USD 960 safari balance to Suricata Safaris, clarify with Richard whether the ranger tip is included or if it needs to be paid separately in cash.
